since_last: 9% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -0.62%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 9% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.05% · Gold +0.36% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 9% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -0.62%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -0.62%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.18%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +3.35%, SO +1.70%, D +0.66%, LEU +0.63%, PEG +0.49%. Laggards: ISRG -11.18%, AMAT -3.64%, LSCC -3.61%, LRCX -3.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.56% at $127.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
